markdown:
# Potion of Heroism

When you drink this potion, you gain 10 [[temporary_hit_points]] that last for 1 hour. For the same duration, you are under the effect of the [[bless]] spell (no Concentration required).

This potion's blue liquid bubbles and steams as if boiling.
